title: extract_response error-method check needs RFC reference
description: client.rs line 322: 'if inv.method == error' checks for a JMAP error response by comparing a magic string literal with no comment. A contributor reading this cold would not know that 'error' is the wire method name defined in RFC 8620 section 3.6.1, or that any other method name means success. Add an inline comment on the guard line citing the spec section.
